name: Eye of Vecna
requirement: To use the Eye of Vecna, you must place it in your own empty eye socket. If you do not already have a missing eye, the process of plucking out your own and replacing it gives you a Flaw.
passiveEffect: You automatically see through illusions and traps.

abilities.name: Baleful Stare
abilities.description: 3/rest: You shoot an optic blast of negative energy at one target. +12 to hit, range: line of sight, 1d8+10 dmg. Target must succeed on a DC 15 Con Save or has disadvantage on its next attack.

abilities.name: Dominate Fate
abilities.description: You have 4 Destiny points. Whenever you roll a die, you may spend any number of points to change the natural result of the die up or down by 1 per point spent. This effect averts critical misses and can cause critical hits. Points return after a long rest.

abilities.name: Perceive Possibility
abilities.description: You may ask the DM whether using Dominate Fate would allow an attack roll to hit an otherwise-missed target, or allow you to succeed at an otherwise-failed skill check or resistance check. The DM must answer honestly.

name: Hand of Vecna
requirement: To use the Hand of Vecna, you must place it on your own arm stump. If you do not already have a missing hand, the process of lopping off your own and replacing it gives you a Flaw.
passiveEffect: You have an additional +4 to melee attack and damage rolls. Additionally, you have a climb speed of 10.

abilities.name: Touch of Rot
abilities.description: 3/rest: Whenever you succeed with a melee attack, you may add 2d10 to the damage.

abilities.name: Grasp Destiny
abilities.description: You have 4 Destiny points. Whenever you roll a die, you may spend any number of points to change the natural result of the die up or down by 1 per point spent. This effect averts critical misses and can cause critical hits. Points return after a long rest.

abilities.name: Seize Power
abilities.description: You may ask the DM whether using Seize Power would allow an attack roll to hit an otherwise-missed target, or allow you to succeed at an otherwise-failed skill check or resistance check. The DM must answer honestly.

abilities.name: Flaw Removal
abilities.description: 3 charges: Use a charge to remove a single Flaw from one character.

abilities.name: Double Draw
abilities.description: 3 charges: Use a charge when a character draws from the item deck: that character may draw two cards and keep one. Put the other on the bottom of the deck.

abilities.name: Death's Door
abilities.description: 3 charges: As a reaction, use a charge when a character would die: that character instead drops to 0 and doesn't die until they drop to -20 HP or until combat has ended. You may use this on yourself.

abilities.name: Ability Recovery
abilities.description: 3 charges: Use a charge to recover one use of a limited-use ability.
